description: §60.4/§60.9 — a `<request api= args=@cell>` whose statically-resolvable args value fails the endpoint request-shape width check (here @query is a `{name}` struct but the endpoint expects `Q{id}`, so the required `id` field is missing) fires E-API-REQ-SHAPE-MISMATCH (typer, W3).
rationale: §60.4: the `args` value SHALL type-check against the endpoint's request shape; a field-presence width mismatch on a statically-resolvable `args=@cell` is E-API-REQ-SHAPE-MISMATCH. The endpoint name resolves and `${id}` binds to the reqShape Q.id, so only the shape-mismatch code fires.
